data.name: 0__is_not_a_valid_dryweather_flow_distribution_type
data.value: '{0}' is not a valid dryweather flow distribution type.

data.name: RainfallRunoffApplicationPlugin_Description
data.value: Allows to simulate lumped rainfall runoff models, such as Sacramento and HBV.

data.name: Exception_UnsupportedDataDistributionType
data.value: Unsupported data distribution type for meteo: {0}

data.name: RainfallRunoffOutputFiles_Could_not_delete_file
data.value: Could not delete '{0}'. The file may be locked by another program.

data.name: RainfallRunoffLogFiles_Could_not_reconnect_log_files
data.value: Could not reconnect the Rainfall Runoff log files: {0}

data.name: RainfallRunoffApplicationPluging_Could_not_save_RR_model
data.value: Could not save the Rainfall Runoff model '{0}': {1}

data.name: PavedDataValidation_No_target_for_mixed_flow
data.value: No runoff target has been defined for the paved rainfall/mixed flow, or the selected runoff type does not match any of the linked features.

data.name: PavedDataValidation_Mixed_runoff_has_no_valid_target_for_link
data.value: A paved node mixed sewer link can only be connected (downstream) to a boundary, open water, lateral or waste water treatment plant.

data.name: PavedDataValidation_No_target_for_dry_weather_flow
data.value: No runoff target has been defined for the paved dry water flow.

data.name: PavedDataValidation_Dry_weather_flow_link_has_no_valid_target
data.value: A paved node dry water flow sewer link can only be connected (downstream) to a boundary, lateral or waste water treatment plant.

data.name: PavedDataValidation_Cant_link_to_multiple_waste_water_treatment_plants
data.value: A paved node may not be connected downstream to more then 1 Waste Water Treatment Plant.

data.name: PavedDataValidation_Cant_link_to_multiple_boundaries
data.value: A paved node may not be connected downstream to more then 1 boundary.

data.name: MeteoDataSource_GuidelineSewerSystems
data.value: Guideline Sewer systems

data.value: Long term average

data.value: User-defined

data.name: RainfallRunoffBasinValidator_Multiple_objects_with_same_name
data.value: This object has the same name as one or more other objects.

data.name: RainfallRunoffBasinValidator_WWTP_has_no_incoming_runoff_links
data.value: Wastewater treatment plant has no incoming runoff links

data.name: RainfallRunoffBasinValidator_WWTP_has_no_outgoing_runoff_links
data.value: Wastewater treatment plant has no outgoing runoff links; an implicit boundary will be created.

data.name: RainfallRunoffBasinValidator_WWTP_has_more_than_one_outoging_runoff_links
data.value: Wastewater treatment plant has more than one outgoing runoff link

data.name: RainfallRunoffBasinValidator_Basin_contains_no_catchments
data.value: Contains no concrete catchments

data.value: DryWeatherFlowDefinitions

data.value: No nwrw settings were found.

data.value: Found multiple nwrw settings. Importing the first settings and ignoring the others.

data.value: No settings found for infiltration capacity recovery.

data.value: No settings found for maximum storages.

data.value: Could not find any runoff factors.

data.name: SobekRRNwrwSettingsExtensions_UpdateNwrwSettings_Nwrw_Definitions_in_RR_model_are_not_configured_as_expected__Cannot_load_default_data_in_unexpected_configured_NWRW_surface_settings_object
data.value: Nwrw Definitions in RR model are not configured as expected. Cannot load default data in unexpected configured NWRW surface settings object.

data.name: NwrwDryWeatherFlowDefinitionBuilder_Build_Expected_24_values_but_got__0__values__Skipping_import_of_water_use_per_capita_per_hour
data.value: Expected 24 values but got {0} values. Skipping import of water use per capita per hour.
